Nonsensical.

Slavery Was Very Bad, but the idea that we can definitively identify the worst thing in history - and that it was the 10-20% of the historical human slave trade led specifically by whites - is just damned absurd. 

Some other contenders:

The Mongol Conquests
The Fall of Rome
WW2/the Holocaust
The Black Death
New World population collapse

Communism
The Steppe and Bantu Migrations
The Arab conquests/slave trade

Etc.
